changelog: Added: Full-screen interactive Exercise Picker with infinite scroll and real-time search
Added: Smart Media Engine with automatic image fallbacks and lazy loading for offline support
Added: Active session recovery to seamlessly resume in-progress workouts from the Dashboard
Added: Cross-platform Notification Service for reliable background rest timers
Updated: Routine Builder completely overhauled to use the new visual exercise database
Fixed: Device memory overloading and browser connection limits by implementing chunked data rendering
